name: Full-flow payroll canary
description: Single onboarded company isolated from other payroll specs (the canary serial suite mutates state across its 5 tests: regular payroll, off-cycle bonus, off-cycle correction, transition, dismissal). The base demo react_sdk_demo_company_onboarded already provides 12+ onboarded seed employees and an open biweekly pay period, so we only need to overlay our own biweekly pay schedule (canary 04 reads scenario.paySchedule.uuid to drive the schedule-change API). No location/employee decorations are required — the canaries operate on demo seed employees throughout (canary 05 explicitly excludes scenario-decorated employees via pickOnboardedEmployeeId).
